message:
fix(tests): resolve flaky and failing tests across test suite

- command_palette_e2e: fix key mapping (3 for Shakespeare, not 2)
- inspector_stress: adjust timing budget for debug builds (~7x slower)
- macro_recorder_determinism: add #[serial] to prevent tracing race
- terminal_capabilities_ux_a11y: fix profile display assertions and add
  ScopedRenderLock for thread safety
- table_theme: fix doctest imports (use ftui_style:: not crate::)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
